executives.name: Alan Pangbourne
executives.background: Mr. Pangbourne has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior executive roles at Guyanese Gold Corp and Kinross Gold Corporation.

executives.name: Candace MacGibbon
executives.background: Ms. MacGibbon is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 25 years of experience in the mining sector and capital markets.

executives.name: Catherine McLeod-Seltzer
executives.background: Ms. McLeod-Seltzer is an independent director and has been the Chair of the Board since 2019. She is a recognized leader in the minerals industry and has helped raise over $600 million in working capital for mining exploration.

tenure_dates.title: Independent Chair of the Board / Director

executives.name: Christopher Hill
executives.background: Mr. Hill has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, primarily in financial and corporate development roles. He was previously Treasurer of Kinross Gold Corporation.

executives.name: Geoffrey Gold
executives.background: Mr. Gold was appointed Executive Vice-President, Corporate Development, External Relations and Chief Legal Officer on January 1, 2016. He joined Kinross in May 2006 as Senior Vice-President and General Counsel.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice-President and Chief Legal Officer

executives.name: Ronald Halas
executives.background: Mr. Halas is a Professional Engineer with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including roles at IAMGOLD, Kinross Gold, and Vale.

executives.name: Tim Bradburn
executives.background: Mr. Bradburn has over 25 years of experience in corporate law and governance. He joined IAMGOLD in 2009 and was appointed Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary in 2017.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, General Counsel & Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Timothy Baker
executives.background: Timothy Baker has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer of Kinross Gold Corporation and held various executive positions at Placer Dome.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Claude Schimper
executives.background: Mr. Schimper was appointed Executive Vice-President and Chief Operating Officer on July 1, 2022. He was previously Executive Vice-President, Russia and West Africa Operations. He joined Kinross in 2010 and has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Paul Tomory
executives.background: Mr. Tomory was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of Centerra Gold in May 2023. Prior to joining Centerra, he served as Executive Vice President and Chief Technical Officer at Kinross Gold Corporation from 2017 to 2023. He has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Technical Officer

board_of_directors.name: Candace MacGibbon
board_of_directors.background: Ms. MacGibbon is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 25 years of experience in the mining sector and capital markets.

board_of_directors.name: Catherine McLeod-Seltzer
board_of_directors.background: Ms. McLeod-Seltzer is an independent director and has been the Chair of the Board since 2019. She is a recognized leader in the minerals industry and has helped raise over $600 million in working capital for mining exploration.

tenure_dates.title: Independent Chair of the Board / Director

board_of_directors.name: Ronald Halas
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Halas is a Professional Engineer with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including roles at IAMGOLD, Kinross Gold, and Vale.
